---
title: "Spatial Epidemiology: Disease Mapping and Surveillance"
subtitle: "BIO-008 | Track A — Biostatistics / Track B Overlap"
description: "The intersection of spatial statistics and epidemiology: mapping disease risk, detecting clusters, and modeling spatio-temporal disease dynamics."
date: "2026-04-11"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
---

# Spatial Epidemiology: Disease Mapping and Surveillance

*Content not yet generated.*

Run the generation pipeline and then `src/quarto_export.jl` to populate this page.
